description: Greenfield workflow — build a project or major subsystem from scratch when the idea is already validated. Behavioral-design specifies the WHAT (Jobs + scenarios + edges), project-planning sets the HOW, plan-quality-review tightens it, then standard implementation / audit / test / docs. Run idea-exploration first if you haven't decided whether to build the idea. Wire in agentwright:ui-design via a custom workflow if the project has UI surfaces to design upstream.

phases.name: design-review
phases.summary: Design ready — behavioral-design.md (Jobs, scenarios, edges). User reviews. Resume to start HOW-level project planning.

phases.name: plan-review
phases.summary: Project plan + plan-quality-review findings ready. User reviews. Resume to dispatch implementation to peers.

phases.name: implement
phases.directive: Implement the project plan in artifacts/plan.md. Decompose into independent tasks (per module or per implementation step) and dispatch to available peers. Run any tasks yourself if no peers are available.
